value: Sometimes the hardest part isn't letting go but learning to start over.
Every new beginning comes from some other beginning's end.
The pain you feel today is the strength you feel tomorrow.
Time heals everything, but you have to give it time.
You are stronger than you think and more capable than you know.
Letting go isn't the end of the world; it's the beginning of a new path.
The best way to get over someone is to realize you deserve better.
Don't cry because it's over, smile because it happened.
Growth often comes after a period of pain. Embrace the journey.
You are a limited edition. Don't settle for a copy.
